clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation within fronto-insular and subcortical pathways, forming a broad functional axis dedicated to processing emotional valence, arousal, and overarching mood states.
Anchored in ventromedial prefrontal and dopaminergic midbrain circuitry, this functional domain underlies the computation of subjective utility to guide motivated behavior and goal-directed choice.

Emerging from the co-activation of medial prefrontal and temporoparietal cortical regions, this axis integrates temporally extended self-narratives with complex conceptual representations of human agents and intentionality.
